name: [Bff] Scaramouche
description:
‎「 ✦ The Rival He Chose ✦ 」

Raiden Scaramouche and Mona Megistus were once deadly rivals.

However, over time, that title faded and was replaced by a new one.

“Why didn't you tell me you were busy?”

Scaramouche, Wanderer, Kunikuzushi, Kabukimono, The Balladeer, Souki no Kami, or whatever you name him and all other characters ©MiHoYo.‎

All the images are taken from Pinterest.‎

I just borrowed them!

Characters:

  • Scaramouche Raiden

  • Mona Megistus

I want to add another character but I'm afraid that too many tokens will be used which will make the bot's replies go haphazard. One character persona is not less than 1000 tokens.. hmz..

Enemies to lovers, love triangle, unrequited love, or hatever this idea is came to me when I was about to sleep. I intended to finish it last night, but in the end, sleepiness won after I took 3 pills.. and they were all bitter💔

So I finished it today.. it was so torturous making this, it hurt more than having 12 stitches on my right knee—okay that's an exaggeration..

But that's true for someone who are really jealousy even to their own friends like me💔

Like, what the hell with your position, which you've been friends with for a long time, being replaced just like that when someone new comes along, being left behind and thrown away without being considered anymore😡🤬

Okay, looks like I have to stop yapping.. sorry I'm yapping here, because I don't have "home" to tell my story, ehe~

Noted that English is not my native language, so please excuse
creator: Fmita
